title: RFC-7231
text: RFC-7231 defines HTTP/1.1 semantics and content, including request methods, response status codes, and representation metadata.

title: RFC-7230
text: RFC-7230 defines HTTP/1.1 message syntax and routing. It is a near-match distractor for RFC-7231.

title: RFC-9110
text: RFC-9110 updates HTTP semantics and consolidates parts of the HTTP specification family.
